org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Interface Scheduler<AT extends Agent>

  • Type Parameters:
    AT - is the type of the agents to schedule.
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractScheduler, DefaultScheduler
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public interface Scheduler<AT extends Agent>
    Scheduler for agents.

    A scheduler must make the agents alive.

    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void schedule(Kernel<AT,?,?,?> runningKernel, Environment<AT> environment, List<AT> agents)
      Deprecated. 
      Run the elements of the simulation: environment and agents.
      void schedule(List<AT> agents)
      Deprecated. 
      Make the specified agents alive.

    • Method Detail

      • schedule

        void schedule(Kernel<AT,?,?,?> runningKernel,
            Environment<AT> environment,
            List<AT> agents)
        Deprecated. 
        Run the elements of the simulation: environment and agents.

        Invoked when the agents AND the environment must be scheduled.

        Parameters:
        runningKernel - is the kernel that has invoked this function.
        environment - is the environment object associated to this execution
        agents - is the list of agents to schedule.

      • schedule

        void schedule(List<AT> agents)
        Deprecated. 
        Make the specified agents alive.

        Invoked when the only agents must be scheduled.

        Parameters:
        agents - is the list of agents to schedule.
